comment: perspective at velocity layer 4 (loudest). Sampled every 3 semitones from
A0 (MIDI 21) to C8 (MIDI 108); enumerated as noteSemis [0,3,6,9] so
neighboring out-of-range candidates 404 silently. Filenames use unpadded
MIDI numbers — {MIDI_RAW} placeholder expands to '21'..'108'. Spaces are
encoded as %20 in the pattern so the URL is RFC-valid. Generated by
